User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account on the Med-X platform, including students, creators, and administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's unique email address used for login.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system, determining their permissions and access levels.

isPremium.description: Indicates if the user has an active premium subscription, granting access to exclusive content.

subscriptionExpiresAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user's premium subscription expires. Used to automate downgrading.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was last updated.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp indicating the user's last successful login.

Material.title: Material
Material.description: Represents an educational item such as an e-book, summary, or Q&A pack available on Med-X.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Material entity.

title.description: The title of the educational material.

description.description: A comprehensive description of the material's content and purpose.

type.description: The category or type of the educational material.

level.description: The academic level or target audience for which the material is designed.

filePath.description: The URI path to the actual digital file of the educational material (e.g., PDF).

thumbnailPath.description: The URI path to a thumbnail or cover image for the material.

isPremiumContent.description: Indicates if this material is part of the premium subscription content.

creatorId.description: Reference to the User (creator) who uploaded or authored this material. (Relationship: User 1:N Material)

uploadDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the material was first uploaded to the platform.

lastUpdateDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the material's details or file were last updated.

downloads.description: The total number of times the material's file has been accessed or downloaded.

CreatorProfile.title: CreatorProfile
CreatorProfile.description: Stores public-facing profile information for users who are creators on the Med-X platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CreatorProfile entity, matching the associated User's ID.

userId.description: Reference to the User account associated with this creator profile. (Relationship: User 1:1 CreatorProfile)

bio.description: A short biographical description of the creator, highlighting their expertise or background.

profilePictureUrl.description: The URI path to the creator's profile picture.

socialMediaLinks.description: An array of URIs linking to the creator's social media profiles or personal website.

verifiedByAdmin.description: Indicates if this creator's profile has been officially verified by an administrator.

TeamMember.title: TeamMember
TeamMember.description: Represents a public-facing team member profile on the Creators page.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Captures feedback submissions from users, which can be reviewed and managed by administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Feedback entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who submitted the feedback, if they were logged in. (Relationship: User 1:N Feedback)

email.description: The email address provided by the user if they were not logged in or preferred to use a different email.

message.description: The actual content of the feedback message from the user.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the feedback was submitted.

status.description: The current processing status of the feedback (e.g., New, Reviewed, Archived).

definition.description: Stores private user profile information and account details.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Publicly readable collection of team members for the Creators page.

params.name: memberId
params.description: Unique identifier for the team member.
